title: JSON-First Report Assembly Contract
summary: Builds the final scan-report JSON object and markdown output from validated upstream payloads without changing qualitative judgments or methodology outcomes.
hard_checks: Pending 20-29.9% CAGR exception candidates must remain out of ranked_candidates unless a human later approves them.
Risk enrichment may demote ranking order but may not rewrite score math.
Assembly consumes validated JSON payloads and deterministic calculator outputs only.
